sqlpersonalinfo.statement: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tblHoroPersonalInfo ( id VARCHAR(30) , M_UserId VARCHAR(15) , M_PName VARCHAR(50) , M_Sex VARCHAR(1) , M_Day VARCHAR(2) , M_Month VARCHAR(2), M_Year VARCHAR(5), M_Hr VARCHAR(2) , M_Min VARCHAR(2), M_Sec VARCHAR(2) , M_DST VARCHAR(5) , M_Place VARCHAR(50), M_LongDeg VARCHAR(3), M_LongMin VARCHAR(2), M_LongSec VARCHAR(2), M_LongEW VARCHAR(1), M_LatDeg VARCHAR(3), M_LatMin VARCHAR(2), M_LatSec VARCHAR(2), M_LatNS VARCHAR(1), M_TimeZone VARCHAR(6), M_Ayanamsa VARCHAR(1), M_TimeStamp long not null default 0, onlinechartid VARCHAR(30), M_State VARCHAR(50) default 'not define', M_Country VARCHAR(50) default 'not define' )
